data.name: ConnectionCannotBeChanged
data.value: Connection properties cannot be changed after a connection has been established.

data.name: NotInTransaction
data.value: Cannot perform this operation as there is no open transaction.

data.name: ConnectionFailure
data.value: Failed to connect to server {server}.

data.name: InvalidPropertyValue
data.value: Cannot apply value '{value}' to property {property}: {reason}.

data.name: InvalidPropertyValueReasonString
data.value: Value cannot be null.

data.name: InvalidIntegratedSecureValue
data.value: Property {property} is only supported on Windows operating systems.

data.name: InvalidPropertyValueReasonInt
data.value: Value cannot be smaller than {value}.

data.name: ExecutionFailure
data.value: An exception occurred while executing a Transact-SQL statement or batch.

data.name: PropertyNotSetException
data.value: Property {property} was not set.

data.name: CannotSetWhenLoginSecure
data.value: Cannot set {property} property because LoginSecure property is set to true.

data.name: PropertyNotAvailable
data.value: Property {property} cannot be changed or read after a connection string has been set.

data.name: ConnectToInvalidVersion
data.value: This SQL Server version ({serverVersion}) is not supported.

data.name: ClassDefaulConstructorCannotBeUsed
data.value: {className} class default constructor cannot be used.

data.name: ParseError
data.value: Parse error occurred while looking for GO statement. Line {line}.

data.name: PasswordCouldNotBeChanged
data.value: Password could not be changed.

data.name: InvalidLockTimeout
data.value: Invalid LockTimeout value: {lockTimeout}.

data.name: InvalidArgumentCacheCapacity
data.value: Cache capacity must be greater than {capacity}.

data.name: InvalidArgumentCacheNullKey
data.value: The cache item returns a null key.

data.name: InvalidArgumentCacheDuplicateKey
data.value: The cache already contains an item with the same key {key}.

data.name: SqlAzureDatabaseEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure SQL Database Edition

data.name: SqlDataWarehouseEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure Synapse Analytics dedicated SQL pools Edition

data.name: EnterpriseEdition
data.value: Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition

data.name: ExpressEdition
data.value: Microsoft SQL Server Express Edition

data.name: PersonalEdition
data.value: Microsoft SQL Server Personal Edition

data.name: StandardEdition
data.value: Microsoft SQL Server Standard Edition

data.name: StretchEdition
data.value: Microsoft SQL Server Stretch Database Edition

data.name: SqlManagedInstanceEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure SQL Database Managed Instance Edition

data.name: SqlOnDemandEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure Synapse Analytics serverless SQL pool on-demand Edition

data.name: SqlDatabaseEdgeEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure SQL Edge Edition

data.name: SqlAzureArcManagedInstanceEdition
data.value: Microsoft Azure Arc SQL Managed Instance Edition

data.name: SqlAzureDatabase
data.value: Microsoft Azure SQL Database

data.name: Standalone
data.value: Standalone SQL Server

data.name: InstAPIIsNotInstalled
data.value: InstAPI is required for this type, but it is not installed on this computer.

data.name: CouldNotInstantiateInstAPI
data.value: Could not instantiate InstAPI.

data.name: CouldNotLoadMethodInfoFromInstAPI
data.value: Could not load MethodInfo from InstAPI.

data.name: AssemblyLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load assembly {assemblyName}. Error message: {originalerror}

data.name: SmoSQLCLRUnAvailable
data.value: This functionality is disabled in the SQLCLR. It is recommended that you execute from your client application.

data.name: CannotBeSetWhileConnected
data.value: ServerVersion cannot be set while connected.

data.name: CannotPerformOperationWhileDisconnected
data.value: Operation cannot be performed when the connection is forced to be disconnected.

data.name: CannotSetTrueName
data.value: TrueName cannot be set, unless the connection is forced to be disconnected.

data.name: TrueNameMustBeSet
data.value: TrueName must be set if the connection is forced to be disconnected.

data.name: UnableToSavePasswordFormat
data.value: The password for user '{userName}' could not be saved to the Windows credential manager.
